note: V5 of the Hecate on-chain vault project. HecateVault and MockUSDC are written + Forge-tested but NOT yet integrated with the running engine (that's V6). MockUSDC is a 6-decimal demo token with a public mint; do not use these addresses for anything outside the Hecate Sepolia demo.

HecateSettlementVerifier.purpose: ecrecover-based receipt verifier. Predates V5; deployed earlier.

MockUSDC.purpose: 6-decimal ERC-20 with public mint. Used as the USDC leg of the Hecate vault. Demo-only.
MockUSDC.name: Mock USDC (Hecate demo)

HecateVault.purpose: Production-style prefunded vault. ENGINE address is immutable, set to the LOCAL_DEV_KEY-derived address.

demo_agents.note: These are the addresses derived from the local .demo-wallets.json. Each clone of the repo has its own set; these are the addresses funded for THIS deployer's demo on Sepolia.

D.note: intentionally underfunded for the INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS demo branch (needs ~3600 mUSDC, has 200)
